testcase.name: testTrigger4xxDoesNotRetry
testTriggerSendsContentTypeHeader
testTrigger5xxRetriesExhaustedThrows
testcase.system-out: 11:16:49.295 [main] DEBUG com.hermes.sdk.webhook.HMACSigner - HMAC signature generated: length=64 11:16:49.295 [main] INFO com.hermes.sdk.webhook.WebhookClient - Triggering webhook: route=test, url=http://127.0.0.1:18750/webhooks/test, payloadKeys=[k] 11:16:49.297 [main] WARN com.hermes.sdk.webhook.WebhookClient - Webhook 5xx, retrying in 0ms (attempt 1/2): status=500 11:16:49.339 [main] WARN com.hermes.sdk.webhook.WebhookClient - Webhook 5xx, retrying in 0ms (attempt 2/2): status=500

testcase.name: testTriggerWithHMACSignatureHeader
testTrigger5xxRetriesUntilSuccess
testcase.system-out: 11:16:49.398 [main] DEBUG com.hermes.sdk.webhook.HMACSigner - HMAC signature generated: length=64 11:16:49.398 [main] INFO com.hermes.sdk.webhook.WebhookClient - Triggering webhook: route=test, url=http://127.0.0.1:18928/webhooks/test, payloadKeys=[k] 11:16:49.400 [main] WARN com.hermes.sdk.webhook.WebhookClient - Webhook 5xx, retrying in 0ms (attempt 1/2): status=500 11:16:49.443 [main] WARN com.hermes.sdk.webhook.WebhookClient - Webhook 5xx, retrying in 0ms (attempt 2/2): status=500 11:16:49.487 [main] INFO com.hermes.sdk.webhook.WebhookClient - Webhook triggered successfully: status=202, response={"status":"accepted","delivery_id":"wh-default"}

testcase.name: testTriggerHandlesEmptyResponseBody
testcase.system-out: 11:16:49.503 [main] DEBUG com.hermes.sdk.webhook.HMACSigner - HMAC signature generated: length=64 11:16:49.504 [main] INFO com.hermes.sdk.webhook.WebhookClient - Triggering webhook: route=test, url=http://127.0.0.1:20234/webhooks/test, payloadKeys=[k] 11:16:49.509 [main] INFO com.hermes.sdk.webhook.WebhookClient - Webhook triggered successfully: status=202, response=

testcase.name: testTriggerSendsCorrectBody
testTriggerSendsCorrectPath
testTriggerSuccess
testTriggerParsesDeliveryIdFromResponse
testTriggerIOExceptionFailsWithNetworkException
